description: Recent storyline prompts for recap angle selection. Use only as editorial prompts and ground all claims in the current packet.

storylines.label: Bench texture
storylines.prompt: If bench scoring or reserve minutes show a clear edge, consider whether the second unit changed the game's rhythm.
risk_flags: Bench impact should be described through points/minutes only unless play-by-play supports more.

storylines.label: Chasing the game
storylines.prompt: If an early run or lopsided quarter forced Washington to chase, make the recap about the possessions that made recovery difficult.
risk_flags: Do not describe body language, huddles, or mood.

storylines.label: Stat with restraint
storylines.prompt: Use the strongest verified stat edge as the article spine, while acknowledging that one game is not a season-long verdict.
risk_flags: Avoid trend language unless multiple games are included in the packet.
